decision_blocked_actions.rationale: Changes live runtime state; crosses operational authority boundaries.
Publishes code outside local repository; requires code integrity review.
Changes canonical branch; requires formal pull request verification.
Introduces sensitive material; forbidden in source code or local previews.
Connects to real services/users; could cause unexpected side-effects.
Could trigger agent actions without manual confirmation gates.
Could approve real mutations in live control environments.
Makes artifacts public; violates confidentiality guidelines before release.
Requires formal authorization authority from government/security sponsors.
